instruction: Use VBA or remove only one instance of a value in the 'Batch' column and 'Status' column, when the 'Batch' Column matches a value in the 'Result values' column, even if the matching value appears multiple times in the 'Batch' column. After the matching values are removed from the 'Batchs' and 'Status' columns, remove the resulting blank cells in the columns to shift all the remaining values together. The solver result should be the sum of column A. Difference is the difference between solver result and target value.
